Localization.Name: 2954 Red Festival Poster
Localization.Description: Celebrate the Red Festival and 2954 being the year of the dog with this colorful poster. It features adorable dogs and stormwals set against a stylized red and blue background. It also honors the festival's historic ties to Earth with "Happy New Year" written in two languages that originated on Humanity's homeworld.
